title: Tornado Cash Governance - REKT
relevance_summary: Governance proposal with flash-loaned votes on DAO

prevention.rule: Block any tx that uses CREATE2 opcode and self-destructs immediately
prevention.trigger: CREATE2 opcode -> self-destruct() in single tx

red_flags: use of CREATE2 opcode combined with self-destruct
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that uses CREATE2 opcode and self-destructs immediately
summary: An attacker exploited Tornado Cash's governance system by deploying a malicious proposal contract using CREATE2 and self-destructing it to reset the nonce and redeploy the malicious contract at the same address. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions.
